title: LightItemCooldown
description: Cooldown added to items: Shield, Bow, Crossbow, Trident, Riptide Trident, Ender Pearl, Golden Apple,
body:
### LightItemCooldown Plugin

----

**Features:**

**Flexible Cooldown Management:**
- Cooldown added to items: Shield, Bow, Crossbow, Trident, Ender Pearl, Golden Apple, Enchanted Golden Apple.

**Easy Configuration:**
- Cooldown durations and settings can be easily managed through the config.yml file.

**Optimized Performance:**
- The plugin provides effective cooldown management while minimizing impact on game performance.

**Known Issues:**

- Using Riptide Trident may mistakenly apply cooldowns to normal tridents.
- Using normal tridents may mistakenly apply cooldowns to Riptide Tridents.

----
